description_long: This sculpture depicts two human figures in a dramatic, emotional pose, rendered in a greenish patinated bronze. One figure lies supine on a rectangular plinth, while the other leans over them, reaching out in a gesture of care or mourning. The figures are highly detailed, with visible musculature and expressive body language, and are set against a rough, textured backdrop that rises behind them. The entire composition rests on a large, rectangular stone base with beveled edges, giving the piece a monumental presence. The patina of the bronze gives the sculpture a weathered, historic appearance, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements. The base appears to have a plaque or inscription area on the front, though the text is not legible in the images.
description: A dramatic bronze sculpture of two human figures, one reclining and one leaning over, set on a large stone base with a weathered green patina. The piece is highly detailed and expressive, with a monumental presence.
description_view_0: Front view showing both figures clearly, with the leaning figure reaching over the reclining one and the plaque area visible on the base.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the depth of the composition and the overlapping forms of the two figures.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the textured backdrop and the back of the leaning figure, with less detail of the faces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the reclining figure's profile and the rough texture of the backdrop.
attribute_subject_matter: two human figures in an expressive, emotional pose
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a large stone base, suggesting an outdoor public or commemorative setting.
